narrative: Fed 3.75%. The weak jobs report fuels a bull steepener in the US yield curve, boosting EUR/USD to 1.1447 and dragging USD/JPY down to 160.95 despite a supportive +270bp OIS carry advantage. Cross-asset moves show gold higher +1.42% near $4,140, equities -0.17%, DXY -0.62%, and VIX 16.6. Watch the RBNZ rate decision on July 8 as the next major G10 policy catalyst.
